SEARCH
Package com.scanlinearcade.games.breakout

Class BreakoutScore

java.lang.Object
com.scanlinearcade.games.breakout.BreakoutScore
public class BreakoutScore extends Object
Domain Model Class: BreakoutScore

Intent: Encapsulates score and lives state for a Breakout session and provides rendering support for a lightweight on-screen HUD.

Public API Signatures:

  • public BreakoutScore(int startingLives)
  • public void reset(int startingLives)
  • public void addScore(int amount)
  • public void loseLife()
  • public int getLives()
  • public int getScore()
  • public void draw(Graphics2D g2, int panelWidth)

Package-private API Signatures: None in current implementation.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BreakoutScore(int startingLives)
    Creates a score model with the given number of starting lives.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addScore(int amount)
    Adds points to the current score.
    void

    Draws the score and lives HUD.
    int
    getLives()
    Returns remaining lives.
    int
    getScore()
    Returns current score.
    void
    loseLife()
    Decreases remaining lives by one, without going below zero.
    void
    reset(int startingLives)
    Resets score and lives for a new game.

  • Constructor Details

    • BreakoutScore

      public BreakoutScore(int startingLives)
      Creates a score model with the given number of starting lives. Signature: public BreakoutScore(int startingLives)
      Parameters:
      startingLives - initial number of lives

  • Method Details

    • reset

      public void reset(int startingLives)
      Resets score and lives for a new game. Signature: public void reset(int startingLives)
      Parameters:
      startingLives - lives to assign after reset

    • addScore

      public void addScore(int amount)
      Adds points to the current score. Signature: public void addScore(int amount)
      Parameters:
      amount - number of points to add

    • loseLife

      public void loseLife()
      Decreases remaining lives by one, without going below zero. Signature: public void loseLife()

    • getLives

      public int getLives()
      Returns remaining lives. Signature: public int getLives()
      Returns:
      current life count

    • getScore

      public int getScore()
      Returns current score. Signature: public int getScore()
      Returns:
      accumulated points

    • draw

      public void draw(Graphics2D g2, int panelWidth)
      Draws the score and lives HUD. Signature: public void draw(Graphics2D g2, int panelWidth)
      Parameters:
      g2 - graphics context used for rendering
      panelWidth - panel width used to position text on the right side
